title: The Husband
director: Nanni Loy, Fernando Palacios, Gianni Puccini
writer: Rodolfo Sonego, Alberto Sordi, Nanni Loy
actors: Alberto Sordi, Aurora Bautista, Luigi Tosi
plot: Alberto's marriage is a complete failure: his wife Elena is a hard woman influenced by her mother and sister who live with the married couple. Alberto is also experiencing financial problems and hopes for the help of a rich widow ...
